    www/youtube_dl: Add Github to MASTER_SITES.

    The original site is unreachable from IPv6-only networks.

    While there, switch to using DISTVERSION.

    PR:             256432
    Tested by:      arrowd
    Approved by:    multimedia (maintainer timeout)
